headlines.title: White House touts deals on soybeans and rare earths after Trump-Xi summit, while China talks up tariff cuts
headlines.summary: The meeting between U.S. President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping last week yielded new pacts, though the sides have provided differing details.

headlines.title: Samsung strike involving 47,000 workers looms as South Korea’s president urges labor deal
headlines.summary: South Korea’s government stepped up pressure on Samsung Electronics and its union to avert a strike that officials say could cost the economy billions.

headlines.title: China's April economic data underwhelms, with retail sales growth slowing to lowest since 2022
headlines.summary: China's economy stumbled in April with consumption, industrial output and investment growth missing expectations.

headlines.title: South Korea market volatility nears record high after $13 billion foreign investor selloff
headlines.summary: South Korea's stock market volatility surged near record highs on Monday after foreign investors dumped $13.2 billion worth of local equities last week.

headlines.title: Trump warns Iran to 'get moving' or 'there won’t be anything left'
headlines.summary: The president has previously threatened to strike civilian infrastructure in Iran, a potential war crime.

headlines.title: Mizuho shares slide 7% after denying decision on reported Rakuten Bank investment shift
headlines.summary: Shares of Mizuho Financial Group fell over 7% Monday, after the company said it has not made decision yet on investment in Rakuten Bank.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts suggest these 3 stocks for their long-term prospects
headlines.summary: Robust spending and strong demand for AI infrastructure have reinforced analysts' confidence in several stocks after earnings season.

headlines.title: For better or worse, investors are living through Trump’s stock market. Here's why
headlines.summary: President Donald Trump has been considered the ultimate stock market president, overseeing an expansion to record highs as well as major declines.

headlines.title: Berkshire's new CEO overhauls portfolio, dumping a slate of stocks
headlines.summary: Berkshire Hathaway's equity portfolio got one of its biggest renovations ever during Greg Abel's first three months as the company's CEO.

headlines.title: Berkshire Hathaway returns to airlines with $2.6 billion stake in Delta Air Lines
headlines.summary: The Omaha-based company built a position worth more than $2.6 billion, making Delta Berkshire's 14th-largest holding at the end of March.

headlines.title: Exxon's once-hefty dividend is now tiny. Here's how to fix that
Nvidia's trillion-dollar run puts pressure on the bulls
headlines.summary: Nvidia's market cap is now just shy of $5.7 trillion, up from $4.7 trillion as of market close last Tuesday.

headlines.title: Dow futures drop, oil prices push higher as Iran war remains stuck in stalemate
headlines.summary: U.S. stock-index futures fell and crude prices rose on Sunday, after the market’s rally stalled last week as oil prices rose sharply amid the impasse in the war with Iran.

headlines.title: Health officials declare Ebola outbreak a public health emergency
headlines.summary: A rare strain of Ebola virus likely caused 80 deaths in Congo and Uganda, prompting the World Health Organization to declare a public health emergency.

headlines.title: The Iran war could be a $300 billion shock — driving up mortgage rates and squeezing wages
headlines.summary: The Trump administration and Congress can act now to bring down energy costs and make Americans’ lives more affordable.

headlines.title: Walmart and Target are about to show just how much shopping habits have changed due to the Iran war
headlines.summary: Walmart has said that customers start to cut spending when gas prices hit $4.50 to $5 a gallon.

headlines.title: Nvidia is getting some help as it props up S&P 500 earnings growth
headlines.summary: Micron is expected to be the second-largest contributor to the index’s overall earnings growth — behind Nvidia, whose impact will likely diminish.

headlines.title: What former poker champion turned investing coach Annie Duke says most of us get wrong about risk
headlines.summary: The author of ‘Quit’ talks about market bubbles, costly investing mistakes and why investors freeze at the worst time.

observations: High concentration in Communication Services may expose the portfolio to sector-specific risks.
Underperformance in positions such as OKLO, IREN, FBL, and LEU indicates potential structural weaknesses in the portfolio.
suggested_changes: Trim META by ~7 share(s) to bring weight under 25%
Consider reallocating funds from underperforming positions to sectors aligned with investor preferences, such as AI, clean energy, or cybersecurity.
open_questions: What is the investor's stance on holding underperforming positions like OKLO, IREN, FBL, and LEU?
Is there a preference for increasing exposure to preferred themes if cash is deployed?
Should we consider diversifying into new sectors to mitigate concentration risk?
